paper_title: Essentially tight bounds for rainbow cycles in proper edge-colourings
summary: Question 10.1 appears in the concluding Section 10 of arXiv:2309.04460, which collects open problems remaining after the main results on rainbow cycles in proper edge-colourings and the connections to additive number theory for non-abelian groups. The full statement could not be retrieved from the HTML version of the paper (content ends before Section 10). No follow-up paper specifically resolving this question was identified through web search. A related 2026 preprint (arXiv:2602.08390, Kuang–Wang) extends the rainbow-cycle line of work to rainbow clique subdivisions but does not appear to address Question 10.1.
